# openwebui_tool_servers_config (Resource)

Manages OpenWebUI tool servers configuration. This is a singleton resource with a fixed ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `tool_server_connections` (Attributes List) List of tool server connections. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tool_server_connections))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Fixed identifier for the tool servers config (always 'tool_servers').

<a id="nestedatt--tool_server_connections"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tool_server_connections`

Required:

- `path` (String) The path on the tool server.
- `url` (String) The URL of the tool server.

Optional:

- `auth_type` (String) The authentication type.
- `config` (Map of String) Additional configuration for the tool server.
- `key` (String, Sensitive) The authentication key.
- `type` (String) The type of the tool server.
